$comment: The closed menu of design pairing sets. Each pairing bundles a font pairing, a motion signature, and fallback palettes (light + dark) that are KNOWN to work together — agents pick a whole pairing by id, never mix parts from different pairings. Selected via the build config's `pairing` field. An explicit `theme`/`themePreset` in the build config (e.g. from brand ingest) overrides the pairing's fallbackTheme; fonts and motion always come from the pairing. fallbackThemeDark is the palette behind the site's dark mode: --accent flips to a light readable tint and --accent-contrast (the text color on accent fills) flips to a near-black ink. Every palette is validated by bin/validate-contrast.mjs — all text roles >= 4.5:1 WCAG contrast on both backgrounds, dark-mode accents >= 4.5:1 as text on both dark backgrounds, and --accent-contrast >= 4.5:1 on both accents. Run the validator after ANY palette edit.

motionModes.still: No scroll animation; one gentle fade on page load. Confident, quiet.
motionModes.reveal: Sections fade + slide up as they scroll into view, standard pace. Versatile default.
motionModes.reveal-fast: Same reveal language at a brisk pace. Feels efficient, energetic.
motionModes.reveal-slow: Same reveal language, slow and gentle. Feels calm, unhurried.
motionModes.hover-precision: Minimal scroll motion; crisp, fast hover/focus states with a subtle lift. Feels tactile and engineered.
motionModes.hover-precision-strong: Hover-precision with a stronger lift and emphasis. Decisive, weighty.
motionModes.playful-bounce: Spring easing with slight overshoot on entrances and hover. Alive, fun.
motionModes.ambient-drift: Slow reveal plus a gentle continuous drift on hero imagery. Atmospheric, editorial.

pairings.label: Playful & Bright
pairings.voice: Warm, energetic, approachable. The site should feel like a friendly storefront: soft-wonky serif headlines, rounded body text, springy motion, saturated warm color.
pairings.for: Retail, cafes and food, event planners, family and kids' services, pet businesses — clients who want energy and warmth.
pairings.avoidFor: Law firms, finance, medical, industrial B2B — reads too casual.

pairings.label: Quiet Luxury
pairings.voice: Elegant, restrained, unhurried. High-contrast serif display over an understated grotesk, no scroll animation at all, desaturated neutrals with one bronze accent. Confidence through stillness.
pairings.for: High-end consultancies, legal, wealth advisors, architecture firms, real estate, boutique agencies — clients selling trust and restraint.
pairings.avoidFor: Kids' services, discount retail, anything that should feel loud or fun.

pairings.label: Industrial Confidence
pairings.voice: Capable, rugged, precise — not sterile. Condensed structural display type, technical body face, crisp engineered hover states, cool neutrals with a steel-blue accent.
pairings.for: Manufacturing, engineering, machining, logistics, construction, trades — businesses that make or move physical things.
pairings.avoidFor: Spas, wellness, luxury retail — reads too utilitarian.

pairings.label: Warm Craft
pairings.voice: Honest, handmade, rooted. Literary warm serif headlines, humanist body text, a standard unhurried reveal, earthy muted tones. Feels like a family business that cares.
pairings.for: Artisans, home services, farms and food producers, family-owned local businesses, woodworkers, landscapers.
pairings.avoidFor: Tech startups, corporate B2B — reads too rustic.

pairings.label: Modern Signal
pairings.voice: Clean, fast, current. Geometric crisp display type, a modern grotesk body, brisk reveals, high-contrast neutrals with one saturated signal accent. The safe-but-sharp default.
pairings.for: Startups, SaaS, tech-adjacent services, modern professional services, agencies. Also the DEFAULT when no direction is given.
pairings.avoidFor: Nothing strongly — this is the most neutral pairing; prefer a more characterful one when the client's answers point somewhere specific.

pairings.label: Editorial Voice
pairings.voice: Considered, literate, atmospheric. Journalistic serif headlines, quiet readable body, slow ambient drift on hero imagery, ink neutrals with a deep-red accent. Content is the hero.
pairings.for: Media, publishers, nonprofits, thought-leadership brands, writers, research and policy organizations.
pairings.avoidFor: Trades and industrial businesses — reads too literary.

pairings.label: Bold Authority
pairings.voice: Decisive, established, substantial. Confident upright condensed display, matched clean body face, strong deliberate hover emphasis, deep navy and charcoal. Gravitas without stuffiness.
pairings.for: Finance, insurance, B2B services, commercial real estate, established firms that lead with credibility.
pairings.avoidFor: Playful consumer brands, artisans — reads too corporate.

pairings.label: Calm Wellness
pairings.voice: Gentle, spacious, reassuring. Quiet legible serif headlines, soft rounded body text, slow gentle reveals, low-saturation cool greens and neutrals. The site should lower the visitor's heart rate.
pairings.for: Spas, wellness practices, therapists, healthcare-adjacent services, yoga studios, coaching practices.
pairings.avoidFor: Industrial, logistics, finance — reads too soft.
